name: Chargebee (Subscription Billing Platform)
pricing_notes: Starter $249/mo (up to $100K MRR); Performance $549/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: API key as HTTP Basic auth username; test and live site keys

performance.notes: REST API; webhook-driven for async events

agent_readiness.notes: Subscription billing and revenue management. import chargebee. chargebee.configure(api_key, site). chargebee.Subscription.create(params). chargebee.Invoice.list({'customer_id[is]': 'cust_123'}). Subscription lifecycle: create, upgrade, downgrade, pause, cancel. Metered billing. Coupons and discounts. Revenue recognition. Dunning management. 100+ payment gateway integrations (Stripe, Braintree, Adyen). Tax compliance (Taxjar, Avalara). SaaS billing platform alternative to building on Stripe directly.

gotchas: Pricing threshold ($100K MRR) — significant jump at scale
Webhook signature verification required for security
Test site data doesn't carry to live site
best_when: SaaS subscription billing with complex pricing (tiers, metered, addons)
Multi-currency and multi-country billing with tax compliance
When building billing from scratch on Stripe would take too long
Revenue recognition and financial reporting for SaaS
avoid_when: Very early stage (<$10K MRR) — cost-benefit vs Stripe billing
When Stripe Billing covers subscription needs
summary: Chargebee is a subscription billing platform with Python SDK. chargebee.Subscription.create(params), chargebee.Invoice.list(). Subscription lifecycle, metered billing, coupons, revenue recognition, dunning. 100+ gateway integrations. Tax compliance (Taxjar, Avalara). Alternative to building subscription logic on raw Stripe. Priced on MRR — starts at $249/mo for up to $100K MRR.
